scripts.test:smoke: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require hooks.ts --require steps/**/*.ts --format progress-bar --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --tags @smoke features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:regression: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require hooks.ts --require steps/**/*.ts --format progress-bar --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --tags @regression features/**/*.feature
scripts.test: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require hooks.ts --require steps/**/*.ts --format progress-bar --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json features/**/*.feature
